results.title: Elie Wiesel's Jerusalem
results.creator_credit: John McGreevy, Pat Ferns, John McGreevy Productions and Nielsen-Ferns
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Cities”.
American author Elie Wiesel takes the viewer on a personal pilgrimage through the legends, myths and historical sights of Jerusalem.

results.title: R.D. Laing's Glasgow
results.creator_credit: John McGreevy, Pat Ferns, Learning Corporation of America and Nielsen-Ferns
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Cities”.
R.D. Laing discusses the city of Glasgow - “its commerce, industry, learning and people; its violence and tenderness and great warm-heartedness”.

results.title: George Plimpton's New York
results.creator_credit: John McGreevy, Pat Ferns, John McGreevy Productions and Nielsen-Ferns
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Cities”.
George Plimpton takes an overall look at the life in New York. From buildings and bridges, beauty and decay, wealth and poverty, to the culture of the people who give the city life.
results.creator_credit_for_label: John McGreevy, Pat Ferns, John McGreevy Productions and Nielsen-Ferns

results.title: Fishing the lake country
results.creator_credit: Ossie Emery, Betti Wood, ABC and Pilgrim Productions
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “A Fisherman’s World”.
Ron Calcutt shows some attractive fishing spots in Sydney and Mallacoota before going to the Gippsland Lakes. All through the film he gives hints on fishing, as well as discussing the ups and downs of the sport.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Ossie Emery, Betti Wood, ABC and Pilgrim Productions

results.title: The Rockhoppers
results.creator_credit: Ossie Emery, Betti Wood and Pilgrim Productions
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “A Fisherman’s World”.
Ron Calcutt discusses the do’s and dont’s of rock fishing for blackfish along the coast of Australia. He points out the need for special care in this exciting sport due to the unpredictable weather and tidal conditions, which cause many people to lose their lives by drowning.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Ossie Emery, Betti Wood and Pilgrim Productions
results.description:

results.title: Pot luck
results.creator_credit: Ossie Emery, Betti Wood and Pilgrim Productions
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “A Fisherman’s World”.
An unplanned fishing trip, looking for likely fishing spots and taking pot luck. Fish caught include flathead, small baitfish and jewfish.
